# Quality Gate Report Template

> **Template ID:** gate-report-tmpl  
> **Purpose:** Standard report generated after each quality gate execution  
> **Generated By:** Orchestrator or gatekeeper agent  
> **Output Location:** `docs/{NN-phase}/` directory

---

## Gate Report: {gate_id}

### Gate Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Gate ID** | `{gate_id}` |
| **Phase** | `{phase}` |
| **Execution Date** | `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` |
| **Executed By** | `{agent_name(s)}` |
| **Decision** | `✅ PASS` / `⚠️ CONDITIONAL` / `❌ FAIL` |
| **Quality Score** | `{score}/10` |
| **Review Duration** | `{duration}` |

---

### Prerequisites Checklist

| # | Prerequisite | Status | Notes |
|---|-------------|--------|-------|
| 1 | {prerequisite_1} | ✅/❌ | {notes} |
| 2 | {prerequisite_2} | ✅/❌ | {notes} |

**Prerequisites Met:** {count_passed}/{count_total} ({percentage}%)

---

### Artifacts Validation

| Artifact | Present | Valid | Notes |
|----------|---------|-------|-------|
| `{artifact_1}` | ✅/❌ | ✅/❌ | {notes} |
| `{artifact_2}` | ✅/❌ | ✅/❌ | {notes} |

**Artifacts Complete:** {count_complete}/{count_total}

---

### Quality Metrics Results

| Metric | Threshold | Actual | Status | Notes |
|--------|-----------|--------|--------|-------|
| {metric_1} | {threshold} | {actual_value} | ✅/⚠️/❌ | {notes} |
| {metric_2} | {threshold} | {actual_value} | ✅/⚠️/❌ | {notes} |

**Metrics Passing:** {count_passing}/{count_total}

---

### Decision Summary

**Decision:** `{PASS / CONDITIONAL / FAIL}`

**Rationale:**
{Brief explanation of why this decision was made, citing specific metric results and prerequisite outcomes}

**Conditions (if CONDITIONAL):**
- {Condition 1: what must be done + deadline}
- {Condition 2}

**Blockers (if FAIL):**
- {Blocker 1: specific issue + impact + recommended resolution}
- {Blocker 2}

---

### Action Items

| # | Action | Owner | Due Date | Priority |
|---|--------|-------|----------|----------|
| 1 | {action_item} | {agent/person} | {date} | HIGH/MED/LOW |

---

### Next Steps

- **If PASS:** Proceed to `{next_workflow}` — update checkpoint.yaml
- **If CONDITIONAL:** {specific conditions to meet before re-running gate}
- **If FAIL:** See `.github/guides/gate-blocker-resolution.guide.md` for resolution guide

---

### Gate History (This Phase)

| Run # | Date | Decision | Score | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|-------|
| 1 | {date} | {decision} | {score} | {notes} |

---

**Generated:** {timestamp} | **Gate Specification:** `.github/gates/{gate_id}.md`
